 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-3q8a","title":"Implement keyboard shortcuts for power users","description":"## Origin
Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-4us. Keep both repos in sync.

## Task
Implement keyboard shortcuts for power users.

## Why This Matters
Power users expect keyboard navigation. Good keyboard shortcuts:
- Speed up common workflows
- Improve accessibility
- Create muscle memory for frequent actions

## Keyboard Shortcuts

### Global Shortcuts
| Shortcut | Action | Context |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `Cmd/Ctrl + K` | Open search | Global |
| `Cmd/Ctrl + /` | Show shortcuts help | Global |
| `Cmd/Ctrl + N` | Create new prompt | Global |
| `Escape` | Close modal/panel | When open |
| `G then H` | Go to home/dashboard | Navigation |
| `G then L` | Go to library | Navigation |
| `G then S` | Go to Swap Meet | Navigation |

### Editor Shortcuts
| Shortcut | Action | Context |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `Cmd/Ctrl + S` | Save/submit | In editor |
| `Cmd/Ctrl + Enter` | Save and close | In editor |
| `Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + P` | Toggle preview | In editor |

### List/Grid Shortcuts
| Shortcut | Action | Context |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `J` / `K` | Move down/up | In list |
| `Enter` | Open selected | In list |
| `S` | Save/bookmark | On item |
| `C` | Copy prompt | On item |
| `/` | Focus search | In list |

### Navigation Shortcuts
| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `[` / `]` | Previous/next page |
| `?` | Show keyboard help |

## Implementation

### Keyboard Hook
```typescript
// src/hooks/use-keyboard-shortcuts.ts
import { useHotkeys } from 'react-hotkeys-hook';

export function useKeyboardShortcuts() {
  const router = useRouter();
  
  // Global navigation
  useHotkeys('g h', () => router.push('/dashboard'));
  useHotkeys('g l', () => router.push('/library'));
  useHotkeys('g s', () => router.push('/swap-meet'));
  
  // Search
  useHotkeys('mod+k', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    openSearchModal();
  });
  
  // Help
  useHotkeys('shift+/', () => openShortcutsHelp());
}
```

### Shortcuts Help Modal
Display all shortcuts in an organized modal:
- Grouped by context
- Show current platform keys (Cmd vs Ctrl)
- Search shortcuts

### Visual Indicators
- Show shortcut hints in tooltips
- Keyboard icon badge on buttons
- Shortcut in dropdown menu items

## Dependencies
```json
{
  "react-hotkeys-hook": "^4.0.0"
}
```

## Accessibility
- Don't override screen reader shortcuts
- Provide non-keyboard alternatives
- Announce actions to screen readers

## Files to Create
- `src/hooks/use-keyboard-shortcuts.ts`
- `src/components/keyboard-shortcuts-help.tsx`
- `src/lib/shortcuts.ts` (shortcut definitions)

## Success Criteria
- All shortcuts work as documented
- No conflicts with browser/OS shortcuts
- Help modal is discoverable
- Shortcuts work across all browsers

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-4dx","title":"Implement theme provider and dark mode toggle","description":"**Details:**
- ThemeProvider wrapping app for dark/light mode
- Persists preference to localStorage
- Respects system preference on first visit
- Dark mode toggle in Nav component
- CSS variables switch based on theme

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// apps/web/src/components/theme-provider.tsx
'use client';
import { createContext, useContext, useEffect, useState } from 'react';

type Theme = 'light' | 'dark' | 'system';

export function ThemeProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const [theme, setTheme] = useState<Theme>('system');
  
  useEffect(() => {
    const stored = localStorage.getItem('theme') as Theme;
    if (stored) setTheme(stored);
  }, []);
  
  useEffect(() => {
    const root = document.documentElement;
    const isDark = theme === 'dark' || 
      (theme === 'system' && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches);
    root.classList.toggle('dark', isDark);
    localStorage.setItem('theme', theme);
  }, [theme]);
  
  return (
    <ThemeContext.Provider value={{ theme, setTheme }}>
      {children}
    </ThemeContext.Provider>
  );
}
```

**Toggle Component:**
- Sun/Moon icon button
- Cycles through light → dark → system
- Tooltip showing current mode

**Location:** 
- apps/web/src/components/theme-provider.tsx
- apps/web/src/components/theme-toggle.tsx

**Reasoning:** Dark mode is expected in developer tools. System preference respect shows attention to detail. Persistent preference provides consistent UX.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:00.527000897-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:08:43.738433267-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:08:43.738433267-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented ThemeProvider with light/dark/system modes, ThemeToggle component, integrated into Providers.tsx. Ready for Nav component to include the toggle. Build and tests pass.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-4dx","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-vsk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:03.111792364-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-4o18","title":"Build Swap Meet browse and discovery UI","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-msj.

## Task
Build the Swap Meet (community prompts) browse and discovery UI.

## Pages

### /swap-meet (Community Browse)
Main community prompts gallery page.

Components:
- Hero section with "Swap Meet" branding and search
- Category pills for quick filtering
- Sort dropdown (Trending, Newest, Top Rated)
- Grid of PromptCard components
- Infinite scroll pagination
- "Featured" section for editor picks
- Empty state when no results

### /swap-meet/[id] (Prompt Detail)
Individual prompt view page.

Components:
- Full prompt content with syntax highlighting
- Copy to clipboard button
- Save to library button
- Fork button
- Author info with avatar and reputation
- Rating display and rate buttons
- Tags list
- Related prompts section
- Share button

## Shared Components

### PromptCard
Reusable card for displaying prompts in grids.

Props:
- prompt: PromptData
- showAuthor: boolean
- showRating: boolean
- onSave: () => void
- onRate: (value) => void

Features:
- Title and truncated description
- Category badge
- Rating indicator (approval %)
- Save/bookmark icon
- Quick copy button
- Hover preview

### CategoryFilter
Horizontal scrollable category pills.

### SortDropdown
Dropdown for sort options with icons.

### RatingButtons
Thumbs up/down buttons with counts.

## Styling
- Use existing Tailwind + Framer Motion patterns
- Card hover animations
- Smooth infinite scroll
- Mobile-responsive grid (1 col mobile, 2 tablet, 3 desktop)
